response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON lyrics for the final chorus of 'Hanafubuki'. The JSON contains the full song lyrics, but since this video segment starts at the final chorus, I have discarded the unused preceding lyrics. I have also transcribed and translated the handwritten message in the outro as it is prominent and relevant on-screen text, following the secondary priority. All timings for the song are strictly tied to the vocal audio waveform.

subtitles.english: If it is fate to scatter together,
Smile on the stage filled with light.
Let us make our dreams bloom,

subtitles.original: 7周年ライブ見てくれてありがとう！！
subtitles.english: Thank you for watching the 7th anniversary live!!

subtitles.original: 新衣装にキレイなステージどうだったかな！？
subtitles.english: How did you like the new outfit and beautiful stage!?

subtitles.original: みんなが少しでも笑顔になってくれたら嬉しいです！！
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if it made you smile even just a little!!

subtitles.original:
8年目もよろしくね～～！！！！！
百鬼あやめ
subtitles.english:
Please support me in my 8th year too~~!!!!!
- Nakiri Ayame
